entry.title: BeforeDawn
entry.content:
#

INSTRUCTION OF
BEFORE DAWN

created by Tonight




‘ For the shadow ‘

Once upon a time, there was this little girl named Mona who lives by the dark woods.
A freezing night when the moon was just covered by the thick clouds which indicated the rainstorm at nose, Mona, together with her little brother, Frank, went on a mysterious adventure across the forest.

It was almost midnight when they found themselves lost.
The fierce storm roaring and the towering trees shaking, they began to fear. For a long time mom had been teaching them not to enter the woods after sunset, only they never took her seriously.

If you are gonna make a tent for the night in such a forest, the first thing to do is to make a campfire against the darkness and the chill. Unfortunately, you would have to prepare firewoods beforehand since the forest is so damp that you can’t find a single dry stick even in the sunny days. There are a lot wired things about the forest which always appears by the name Shadowoods, nevertheless, it’s not the right time for the story teller to open his chatty backpack: two kids are stuck in grave danger, remember?
I mean, to make things worse, it happened that neither of the two had brought firewoods before departure.

It was so dark and

Oh to see without my eyes
the first time that you kissed me
boundless by the time I cried
drowned in living waters
white noise what an awful sound
fumbling by Roger River
feel my feet above the ground
hand of god deliver me
oh woh oh woh oh is me
the first time that you touched me
oh will wonders ever cease
blessed be the mystery of love

city of stars

city of stars
are you shining just for me
city of stars
there’s so much that I can’t see
who knows
I felt ti from the first embrace
I shared with you
that now our dreams
may finally come true
city of stars
just one thing everybody wants
there in the bars
and through the smokescreen of the crowded the restaurants
it’s love
yes all we are looking for is love
from someone else
a rush
a glance
a touch
a dance
a look in somebody’s eyes
to light up the skies
to open the world and send it reeling
a voice that says I will be here
and you will be alright
I don’t care if I know
just where I will go
‘cause all that I need is this crazy feeling
a rat tat-tat on my heart
I think I want it to stay
city of stars
are you shining just for me
city of stars
you never shined so brightly

  • dawn
  • lay behind
  • hello world
  • rule 101

entry.title: record
entry.content:
This blog is officially created on Aug 9th, 2023.

It would be used for record.
Maybe some articles, maybe some learning notes, and maybe just some self-talkings.

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content: 欢迎！如果你碰巧找到这个小角落，请不要急着划走——这里当然没有什么故事，只有一点点被轻轻存放的时间。

entry.title: about
entry.content: Hello! This is Tonight, fancy meeting you here!
